info.title: DimonSmart.NotebookMcpServer
info.description: Model Context Protocol server for managing notebooks with pages of text (stdio). Built with MCPSharp.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for managing notebooks with pages of text and persistent file storage.

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this help message
Configuration:
NOTEBOOK_STORAGE_DIRECTORY    Directory for storing notebook files (default: ./notebooks)
The server listens on stdin/stdout for MCP protocol messages.
